description.en: Creates a new object of the same type as obj, replacing fields with values from changes. If obj is not a Data Class, raises TypeError. If keys in changes are not field names of the given dataclass, raises TypeError. The newly returned object is created by calling the __init__() method of the dataclass. This ensures that __post_init__(), if present, is also called. Init-only variables without default values, if any exist, must be specified on the call to replace() so that they can be passed to...
